story.text:
# ⬢ The Emergence Spell
**👣 → 🎯 | 🌊 → 📜 | ⏰ → 🔓 | 🕊 → ⭕️ → 🔮🤝👤**

> The right people arrive. The right moment happens. The right ending closes. Trust the pattern, for it trusts you.
